film.title: Guru
film.overview: Matt, a charismatic coach, captivates crowds until he spirals into a disturbing downward spiral.

dialogues.dialogue: Have you checked the results in town ? Have you failed ? Oh, you are trying to cover the shame with a job. I've got a job in Turkey. Now how does a pass or fail matter ? I'll beat you. The whole village will laugh that....the math teacher's son has failed. You'll never prosper.

Now pick up both of them and throw them in the dustbin. Editor sir. - Yes ? - I hear you've a new car. Don't you have shame ? Don't you have even a little shame ? We have to apologize to the country. Tomorrow morning's edition will have an apology letter.

Shyam. if you and I break the law we would be scared. But he is proud of breaking the law. And he doesn't just break or bend the law. He buries it and then builds a beautiful park on it....the one with flowers and fountains.
